name: ARF
contributor_comments: 86 sites with at least 90 minutes of recording per night. The bulk of the data comes from one season where six recorders were placed at two different heights in the same locations. 48 nights at 1m and 14 nights at 4 meters, with quite consistent sampling (~9 hours) per night. The remaining sites came from a different season and were visited once each, although some points were quite close to others. During that field season logistical, technical, and cultural constraints often left us with less data per night than we wanted.

name: Stuttgart, Germany
contributor_comments: Study of the effect of landscape composition (=effective Shannon diversity of crops) and landscape configuration (=edge density). We have 32 landscapes, each 1 km x 1 km in size, and covering independent gradients in composition and configuration. All study landscapes were situated in agricultural land with at least 70% cropland. Sometimes hedges and other woody structures are close by, but most recordings were done in open land and always next to an arable field.
